name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new schema field, bounded context capability, jurisdiction profile, or tooling improvement
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A concise description of the feature you'd like.

## Motivation

Why is this needed? What problem does it solve or what use case does it enable?

## Proposed approach

How might this be implemented? Which bounded contexts or schemas would be affected?

- [ ] Aegis Vault
- [ ] Ariadne's Thread
- [ ] Mnemosyne Forge
- [ ] Atlas Codex
- [ ] Moirai Ledger
- [ ] Oracle of Delphi
- [ ] platform-contracts (schemas)
- [ ] policy
- [ ] templates
- [ ] tools
- [ ] docs

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative approaches you have evaluated.

## Additional context

Links to relevant standards, interoperability requirements, or prior art.
